education.label: Education
education.activation_intent: Build problem awareness. Position Kalder as a trusted guide before the buying cycle begins. Serve content that helps potential Champions name and size the problem.
education.content_focus: Thought leadership, industry trends, challenge framing, diagnostic tools

acquisition.label: Acquisition
acquisition.activation_intent: Activate and complete buying groups. Help each role complete their diverge-phase JTBDs. Convert interest into known, engaged buyers across all five roles.
acquisition.content_focus: Solution overviews, use cases, product tours, competitive differentiation, demos

progression_early_to_mature.label: Progression Early-to-Mature
progression_early_to_mature.activation_intent: Deepen engagement across all BG members in active deals. Enable convergence points. Serve content that helps the group align toward shared position.
progression_early_to_mature.content_focus: Case studies, ROI models, consensus briefs, implementation guides, proof of concept support
progression_early_to_mature.double_diamond_phase: Converge — group alignment and convergence point enablement
progression_early_to_mature.content_gating: Mix — converge content designed to travel internally

progression_win_now.label: Progression Win Now
progression_win_now.activation_intent: Final push for late-stage deals. Enable Final Commitment convergence point. Remove late-stage friction — especially Ratifier-triggered blockers.
progression_win_now.content_focus: Executive briefs, procurement guides, security docs, customer references, contract support
progression_win_now.content_gating: Mixed — late-stage content highly personalised by role
